atomic_units.action: Notify the HR Manager and Legal team of the BGV discrepancy
atomic_units.condition: If a BGV discrepancy is identified after the employee has already joined under a conditional joining arrangement

atomic_units.action: Assess the nature of the BGV discrepancy
Determine whether the BGV discrepancy is minor and explainable
atomic_units.condition: Whether the BGV discrepancy is minor and explainable

atomic_units.action: Document the finding and the employee's explanation
atomic_units.condition: If the discrepancy is minor and explainable

atomic_units.action: Close the BGV case and update the employee record
atomic_units.condition: If the discrepancy is minor and explainable

atomic_units.action: Place the employee on administrative leave pending the outcome
